body:
---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: CalRecycle <CalRecycle@public.govdelivery.com>
Date: Wed, May 20, 2026 at 9:32 AM
Subject: Notice of Public Workshop – Rescheduled Covered Battery-Embedded
Waste Recycling Fee Workshop
To: <antonio.hudnall@gmail.com>


View as a webpage  /  Share
<https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fcontent.govdelivery.com%2Faccounts%2FCALRECYCLE%2Fbulletins%2F418351c/1/0101019e463b464e-750feed4-906e-4289-a671-4d4b4077e64c-000000/gOgHS4_sUtvUy5R5hg5l-GiD4ncybu1rryXqxxBTNbs=452>
[image: Proposed Regulations]
Notice of Rescheduled Covered Battery-Embedded Waste Recycling Fee Workshop

The Department of Resources Recycling and Recovery (CalRecycle) rescheduled
the May 26, 2026, informal public workshop. CalRecycle will now hold the
informal workshop on *June 17, 2026,* from* 10:00 AM* to* 12:00 PM*.

Last year, CalRecycle established the covered battery-embedded waste
recycling fee that became effective on January 1, 2026. CalRecycle is
required to establish a covered electronic waste (CEW) recycling fee for
covered battery-embedded products (CBEPs) based on the reasonable
regulatory costs to administer CEW recycling pursuant to PRC Section
42464(b)(3), on or before October 1, 2025, and on or before October 1 each
year thereafter. The CEW recycling fee for CBEPs is referred to as the
“covered battery-embedded waste recycling fee.” The purpose of this
workshop is to consult with the public, the regulated community, and other
interested parties to solicit feedback on the proposed battery-embedded
waste recycling fee that will take effect January 1, 2027.

The public workshop will be accessible via Zoom, via Webcast, and in person
in the Byron Sher Auditorium located on the 2nd floor of the CalRecycle
headquarters at 1001 I Street, Sacramento, California. The Byron Sher
Auditorium is wheelchair accessible.

Please submit comments using the link in the following section by June 24,
2026. Visit the Public Notice to view all the details for this scheduled
workshop.
*Submit Comments*
<https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fcalrecycle.commentinput.com%3Fid=x2fecNb3MC%26utm_medium=email%26utm_source=govdelivery/1/0101019e463b464e-750feed4-906e-4289-a671-4d4b4077e64c-000000/YeGdwYBMScoTc68PDXxBZTXHJ8K_N9cjyV_1nGRgy3Q=452>
*Public Notice*
<https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww2.calrecycle.ca.gov%2FPublicNotices%2FDetails%2F7125%3Futm_medium=email%26utm_source=govdelivery/1/0101019e463b464e-750feed4-906e-4289-a671-4d4b4077e64c-000000/bFjkdKUeSWKHxKNxCnL0HuMErLYnPCbELCujSSLgfnM=452>

Please visit the rulemaking webpage linked below for more information about
this rulemaking.

Presentation slides containing the proposed battery-embedded waste
recycling fee will be provided in advance of this workshop on the public
notice.
------------------------------

By submitting a written comment to CalRecycle in connection with this
rulemaking action you shall be deemed to have expressly indicated a
willingness to receive a notice by means of an electronic written
communication via email unless you specifically request CalRecycle to
deliver its notice(s) via non-electronic communication.

Please note that under the California Public Records Act (Government Code
section 7920.000 et seq.), your written and oral comments, attachments, and
associated contact information (e.g., your address, phone number, email
address, etc.) become part of the public record and can be released to the
public upon request.

Information on how to attend the hybrid workshop on *June 17, 2026*, is
available below.
------------------------------
3 Ways to Attend
[image: CalEPA Building]
In Person
Byron Sher Auditorium,
CalEPA Headquarters

1001 I St, 2nd floor
Sacramento, CA 95814

No registration is necessary to participate in person. Attendees may submit
oral public comments
[image: Zoom logo]
Zoom

Zoom participants may submit oral comments and questions via Zoom.

To attend virtually via Zoom, you must register in advance using the below
link. Registration is free.
*Register for Zoom*
<https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fus02web.zoom.us%2Fmeeting%2Fregister%2F-JAW49VhRuOUBkhm1sJHQg%3Futm_medium=email%26utm_source=govdelivery%23%2Fregistration/1/0101019e463b464e-750feed4-906e-4289-a671-4d4b4077e64c-000000/U6S_EuSauxBOSiHAljEXCbOEQMk6yjokVCklfr2h0N8=452>
[image: Computer showing webinar]
Webcast

Webcast viewers are unable to submit comments and questions. Please join
via Zoom to submit comments and questions. No registration necessary.
*View Meeting*
<https://links-2.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:%2F%2Fvideo.calepa.ca.gov%2F%3Futm_medium=email%26utm_source=govdelivery%23%2F/1/0101019e463b464e-750feed4-906e-4289-a671-4d4b4077e64c-000000/4mg4FYDTX-Wu9J6jbX34vNrGEbStwNfXgXhWDw-8hso=452>
[image: foreign country flags with headphones laying on top symbolizing
language interpretation for meetings]
